description: You are a DevOps engineer at AcmeCorp. The background worker service 'acme-worker' is crash-looping in production. Diagnose the cause of the crash and identify the application configuration parameter controlling memory usage. Modify ~/projects/acme-worker-service/docker-compose.yml to tune the application so it runs safely within the container's 300MB memory limit. You must NOT increase the Docker memory limit. Login: user ga, password password123.
